title: Nallavannu Solvaanga Lyrics Veeram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Nallavannu Solvaanga
Singer: Devi Sri Prasad
Movie: Veeram
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Lyrics: Viveka

People wanna scream
all the people wanna shout
all the people wanna cheer
all the people in the house

hey, here comes the man with new style
he gonna drive everyone wild
..

Nallavannu solvonga nambedadheenga
engala kettavannu sonnaalum thittidadheenga
thangaminnu sonnaalum orasidaadheenga
engala thagaraminnu sonnaalum pagachidadheenga

Sattayila rendu button avaundhu irukkum
oru sandayinna engaloda soundu irukkum
edhiriyoda odambuladhaan kaayam irukkum
ada eppavumey enga pakkam niyayam irukkum

one two three four five
venaam enga kitta wrong side drive (2)

Manam manam manam vella
karai karai karai illa
edakka madakka kannaka
kodutha thudukka adipom ..yes.

pala pala pala vetti,
pada padapakura ghosti
udhava mattum
vetkam maanam paakka maattom

Enga ooru vandhu paaruda ..
adhu tentu kotta joruda..
yaaru padam odi naalum
hero anga naangada..

one two three four five
venaam enga kitta wrong side drive (2)

dai maatingada innaiku.
vendaanda thambi
sonna kelu venaam

Vala vala vala kootam
pagal iravugal aattam..
vananga payala pananga
kanakka nongu eduppom ..

Siru siru siru settai
viru viru viru vettai
Pasiyil aduppaa
alayil thuduppa uruvam eduppom.

andha paalu pasangadaa..
aana karandha paalu manasuda..
kaakkaa vella kokku karuppu
naanga sonna keluda...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message of confidence and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace their individuality.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Veeram, this song is played during a lively celebration, showcasing the protagonist's charismatic personality.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Devi Sri Prasad, who is also the music director, bringing his unique style to the track.

When was the song released?

Nallavannu Solvaanga was released on December 17, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nallavannu Solvaanga, the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the celebratory atmosphere of Veeram. The lyrics, penned by Viveka, encourage listeners to embrace their uniqueness and enjoy life to the fullest. With its catchy beats and lively rhythm, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it ideal for parties and celebrations. This track stands out as a testament to Devi Sri Prasad's musical prowess and ability to create infectious tunes.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nallavannu Solvaanga from Veeram is a vibrant anthem that captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Devi Sri Prasad's electrifying beats and engaging lyrics by Viveka, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party!
stanzaMeanings: Everyone wants to scream, shout, and cheer; all the people in the house are excited.
Hey, here comes the man with a new style; he's going to make everyone excited.
People say we are good, don't doubt us; even if someone calls us bad, don't scold them; even if they say we are worthless, don't listen to them; even if they say we are a burden, don't be bothered.
In the game, there are two buttons; our sound will be there; the rhythm will always be strong; justice will always be on our side.
One, two, three, four, five, no way; we drive on the wrong side.
Mind, mind, mind; no winning, no losing; we will make a big impact, yes.
Many, many, many things; we will only care about the important matters, not the trivial ones.
Look at our town; it's full of energy; no matter who the hero is, we are the real stars.
One, two, three, four, five, no way; we drive on the wrong side.
Hey, don't worry today; listen to what I say, no need to be upset.
Gather, gather, gather; day and night we will dance; we will take the lead and make things happen.
Small, small, small things; big, big, big actions; we will create a form out of hunger and need.
Those kids are sweet, but the ones who are spoiled are troublesome; we will tell the black crows to listen to us.
One, two, three, four, five, no way; we drive on the wrong side.
